mapper.sql: inner join cst_cn_work_calendar wc on wc.cal_date = u.stat_date and wc.is_workday = 1
select id, stat_date, equip_type, use_dept, used_count, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from cst_life_usage
mapper.select: where stat_date = #{statDate} and equip_type = #{equipType} and use_dept = #{useDept} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into cst_life_usage (stat_date, equip_type, use_dept, used_count, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{statDate}, #{equipType}, #{useDept}, #{usedCount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: delete from cst_life_usage where id in #{id}
mapper.select:
select
date_format(u.stat_date,'%Y-%m') as statPeriod, date_format(u.stat_date,'%Y') as statPeriod, u.stat_date as statPeriod,
u.equip_type as equipType, u.use_dept as useDept, sum(u.used_count) as totalCount from cst_life_usage u
and u.stat_date >= #{beginTime} and u.stat_date <= #{endTime} and u.equip_type = #{equipType} and u.use_dept = #{useDept}
group by
date_format(u.stat_date,'%Y-%m'), date_format(u.stat_date,'%Y'), u.stat_date,
u.equip_type, u.use_dept order by statPeriod, equip_type, use_dept

select date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m') as statPeriod, u.equip_type as equipType, ifnull(sum(u.used_count), 0) as totalCount from cst_life_usage u
where u.stat_date >= #{start} and u.stat_date <= #{end} group by date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m'), u.equip_type order by statPeriod, equip_type

select u.use_dept as useDept, ifnull(sum(u.used_count), 0) as totalCount from cst_life_usage u
where u.stat_date >= #{start} and u.stat_date <= #{end} group by u.use_dept order by totalCount desc

select
date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m') as statPeriod, date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y') as statPeriod, u.stat_date as statPeriod,
u.equip_type as equipType,
ifnull(sum(u.used_count) / count(distinct u.stat_date), 0) as avgDailyCount ifnull(sum(u.used_count) / count(distinct u.stat_date), 0) as avgDailyCount ifnull(sum(u.used_count), 0) as avgDailyCount
from cst_life_usage u
where u.stat_date >= #{start} and u.stat_date <= #{end} and u.equip_type = #{equipType} group by
date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m') date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y') u.stat_date
order by statPeriod

select
date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m') as statPeriod, date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y') as statPeriod, u.stat_date as statPeriod,
u.use_dept as useDept,
ifnull(sum(u.used_count) / count(distinct u.stat_date), 0) as avgDailyCount ifnull(sum(u.used_count) / count(distinct u.stat_date), 0) as avgDailyCount ifnull(sum(u.used_count), 0) as avgDailyCount
from cst_life_usage u
where u.stat_date >= #{start} and u.stat_date <= #{end} and u.equip_type = #{equipType} group by
date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y-%m'), u.use_dept date_format(u.stat_date, '%Y'), u.use_dept u.stat_date, u.use_dept
order by statPeriod, avgDailyCount desc
